picks.sp_analysis: Martin: 4.60 FIP, 6.58 K/9 (low), recent ERA 2.50, RELIABLE. Nola: UNRELIABLE label (3 starts), recent ERA 3.68, home ERA 5.40, K/9 12.6. Nola's UNRELIABLE status with poor home ERA (5.40) creates uncertainty.
picks.lineup_analysis: CHC away OPS .691 (weak on road). PHI home OPS .739 (mediocre at home). Neither lineup threatening.
picks.bullpen_note: CHC MODERATE fatigue (Barnes 9.00 ERA). PHI SEVERE + BELOW_AVERAGE (2 arms, pen ERA 4.53). Both pens compromised, both teams back-to-back.
picks.rationale: Nola's UNRELIABLE status (3 starts, 5.40 home ERA) makes him unpredictable despite recent 3.68 ERA. Martin has low K rate (6.58) but recent form is solid. Both teams back-to-back with compromised bullpens creates variance. Hitter park (1.06) suggests OVER but total at 9.5 is already inflated. Phillies ML at -138 has no value with Nola's uncertainty. No clear edge on any bet type.
picks.avoid_reason: Nola UNRELIABLE status creates SP uncertainty. Both teams back-to-back with fatigued bullpens adds variance. Total line 9.5 already accounts for hitter park. No structural edge identified on ML, total, or F5.
picks.flags: Nola UNRELIABLE (3 starts), both teams back-to-back, TBD umpire

picks.sp_analysis: Cantillo: 3.21 ERA, 3.52 FIP, 2.36 xERA, 10.22 K/9, 3.97 BB/9 (RELIABLE, recent 2.67 ERA, away split 4.91 ERA). McGreevy: 4.42 ERA, 4.24 FIP, 5.60 xERA, 5.48 K/9, 1.89 BB/9 (RELIABLE, recent 2.22 ERA, home split 0.00 ERA). Cantillo's away split (4.91 ERA) is concerning. McGreevy's brutal xERA (5.60) and low K/9 (5.48) suggest regression coming despite recent 2.22 ERA.
picks.lineup_analysis: Guardians: 0.858 season OPS, 0.655 away OPS, 3.91 rpg away. Cardinals: 0.946 season OPS, 0.665 home OPS, 3.9 rpg home. Both lineups are mediocre at their respective venues.
picks.bullpen_note: Guardians SEVERE (BELOW_AVERAGE quality, 4.54 ERA, 3 fatigued: Gaddis, Herrin, Allard 4.50 ERA avg). Cardinals SEVERE (BELOW_AVERAGE quality, 4.93 ERA, 3 fatigued: Fernandez, Graceffo, Bruihl 4.94 ERA avg). Both pens are SEVERE + BELOW_AVERAGE — massive OVER signal.
picks.weather_impact: 75F, 29.5 mph SSW wind OUT to CF — meaningful OVER lean, ball carries well
picks.avoid_reason: OVER 8.5 has structural edge (both bullpens SEVERE + BELOW_AVERAGE quality, 29.5 mph wind OUT at 75F, McGreevy's 5.60 xERA regression risk) but violates OVER requirements: park is 0.97 (below 1.10 minimum) and both teams are back-to-back (automatic downgrade). Wind is extreme (29.5 mph OUT) but park factor neutralizes it. Total line already inflated to 8.5 (market sees the bullpen disaster). No clean bet type available — ML requires -115 max and neither SP has confirmed edge, run line is banned without meeting all criteria. SKIP.
picks.flags: Both teams back-to-back, both bullpens SEVERE + BELOW_AVERAGE, TBD umpire, extreme wind conditions

picks.sp_analysis: Away SP is TBD — no matchup data available. Home SP Colton Gordon: 5.34 ERA, 5.33 FIP, 4.64 xERA, 7.53 K/9, 1.99 BB/9, 2.20 HR/9. 2025_ONLY reliability (no 2026 starts). Recent ERA 8.93 over 3 starts (4.4 IP/start) — severe decline. Home split: 5.65 ERA, 7.33 K/9. Gordon is unreliable and declining.
picks.lineup_analysis: Rockies: 0.629 away OPS, 0.281 away wOBA, 3.6 away RPG — terrible road offense. Astros: 0.830 home OPS, 0.366 home wOBA, 6.43 home RPG — strong home offense. Massive OPS gap favoring Houston.
picks.bullpen_note: Rockies: MODERATE fatigue, POOR quality (5.8 ERA, fatigued arm Bellozo 7.59 ERA). Astros: SEVERE fatigue (France, Abreu, Roa), POOR quality (5.9 ERA, fatigued arms 7.53 ERA). Both pens are exhausted and bad.
